text: I’m a construction PM learning AI midlife, and the biggest shift wasn’t “better prompts.” It was giving agents a job boundary: watch one workflow, draft the next move, ask for approval before external action. That’s where automation starts feeling usable for business. https://t.co/g3V6RIZyAP

text:

The second question is where it falls apart.

Seven questions to ask any AI vendor before you sign anything 👇
